column1: It snows only ________ a month in winter. (два раза)
______ ______ times do you go to the theatre? (сколько)
How long does it take from here to your house ___ ______? (на машине)
How long does it take ______ to get from here to the station? (нам)
How long does it take _______ to have breakfast? (им)
How long _____ ____ ______ you to paint a picture? (present simple)
It took me ________ to come back there. (десять минут)
It _______ me one day to make a box. (present simple)
How long does it _______ you to drive home usually?
Steven has been a worker ____ he left school.
